name: Tinta Dashboard
tagline: Multi-workspace dashboard with form builder and PDF export
description: A full-stack multi-workspace dashboard application for Tinta Agency. Features a drag-and-drop form builder, PDF generation with Puppeteer, OTP-based authentication, workspace member management with role-based permissions, and an email invitation system powered by React Email and Resend.
highlights: Server-side PDF generation with Puppeteer and Vercel Blob storage
OTP email authentication with NextAuth.js v5
Email system with React Email templates and Resend
